title: More Concretes
body:
This mod adds many new Concrete Blocks:

![Block Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fba6408735f7f75e36cef1b4b5b4404d3901b041.png)

<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>
  
- Using Blue Concrete: ![Using Blue Concrete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de0cef10a36fedc0d91f14784de832075027c96f.png)
- Using Light Blue Concrete: ![Using Light Blue Concrete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e372506bd66efb830ae1a9d59e1aec8ec8d368d7.png)
- Using Black Concrete: ![Using Black Concrete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08fe010d94b1ef19d5a8a9495be5b5c510ff16a3.png): 
- Using White Concerete: ![Using White Concerete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/262ae9fd8e3f22f0397e3f37734eecccaa67671f.png)
- Using Light Gray Concrete: ![Using Light Gray Concrete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/123b25ac8af954a2536828807628d0623a1c0ee2.png)
- Using Gray Concrete: ![Using Gray Concrete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/664cb3e25ed23576fe9c442c7059af64197fe722.png)
